_comment: MT-077 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: share-pack export only. The selector bundles exactly the sheet + selected media + usage README (subset safety + manifest completeness); unselected media must never leak into the manifest, and no pack path or artifact ref may use the CKC/CastKit namespace or .GOV. All slugs are made run-unique at load time.
